inquiries.query:
/*1:43 AM
Practice Problem 1
Question: Retrieve the list of job titles (job_title) and the corresponding company names (name) for all job postings that mention "Data Scientist" in the job title.
Use the job_postings_fact and company_dim tables for this query.
*/
SELECT
	job_postings_fact.job_title,
    company_dim.name
FROM 
	job_postings_fact
	LEFT JOIN company_dim ON job_postings_fact.company_id = company_dim.company_id 
WHERE
	job_title = 'Data Scientist'
inquiries.name: 25_02_26_prblm3
